description: A real failing path goes undetected because an over-broad false-path exception accidentally excluded it from analysis.
body: Failure mode: a wildcard or loosely scoped set_false_path covers more than the intended static path, so a genuine functional path is never timed. Detection signals: optimistic slack that contradicts hardware behavior, an exception whose scope matches many paths, and failures that vanish when the exception is removed. Do not keep a broad exception to maintain a clean report. Safer fallback: rewrite the exception with explicit from and to points covering only the static path, then rerun STA and fix any newly exposed violations.
